content: Decision: NovaTrade strategy baseline is Rob Hoffman IRB v5 — Relaxed Reliable Build (5min Champion). Locked on 2026-03-25 after reviewer ACCEPT-WITH-NITS.
Debug finding: bolt://localhost:7687 must use auth=None when NEO4J_AUTH is disabled in docker-compose, otherwise the driver hangs for ~30s before raising ServiceUnavailable.

Pattern: integration tests that touch the live nova_neo4j_db container must use a dedicated ad-hoc label (e.g. :AssocRollbackTestNode) plus a finally-block teardown, and must assert count(:base) unchanged before/after the destructive phase.

Context: ADR-0759 locks associative-linking code to the Fusion MCP app/services/associations/ package, with :base as the node label and entity_id as the key property. MEMORY_FOLLOWS was renamed to avoid collision with the existing Session FOLLOWS edge.

Research: for recall eval without hand-labels, LLM-as-judge pinned to a fixed model+temperature=0 is the standard lightweight baseline when no existing ground-truth chain (SUPERSEDES/COMPACTED_FROM) exists to provide pseudo-labels.
Scratch note: HEARTBEAT_MULTIAGENT.md should end with exactly one trailing newline; the normalize step runs after every heartbeat write.
Decision: PLAN-0759 rollback utility (scripts/assoc_rollback.py) must refuse wildcard run_ids ('*', '%', 'all', 'ALL') and empty/whitespace run_ids to protect production data.

Pattern: hermetic Pydantic settings tests must use monkeypatch.delenv on every flag (plus its lowercase alias) and pass _env_file=None; case_sensitive=False still reads os.environ, so _env_file=None alone is not sufficient.

Debug chain: an upsert that succeeds in Pinecone but fails in Neo4j triggers a compensating Pinecone delete; an upsert that fails in Pinecone but succeeds in Neo4j triggers a compensating Neo4j delete. Both rollback paths log a warning but return False.

Context: PLAN-0759 defaults to single-project isolation — SimilarityLinker and EntityLinker will scope queries by the source memory's project, and cross-project linking is opt-in via ASSOC_CROSS_PROJECT_ENABLED=True.
